evals.prompt: Add a new Whale archetype to the swarm simulation — 5 agents that deposit 10x normal capital and hold through vesting like Diamond Hands but with higher leverage perp positions
evals.expected_output: Modifications to AgentLib.sol (new enum, decision logic, config gen), SwarmOrchestrator.sol (agent distribution), HtmlReport.sol (colors/labels), and docs/Swarm_Simulation.md

assertions.text: Identifies all 4 required files: AgentLib.sol, SwarmOrchestrator.sol, HtmlReport.sol, docs/Swarm_Simulation.md
Adds WHALE to the Archetype enum in AgentLib.sol
Adjusts agent distribution to accommodate 5 Whale agents
Provides deterministic config generation with 10x capital multiplier
Implements decide() branch with Diamond Hands hold behavior + higher leverage perp logic

evals.prompt: The simulation is failing at tick 800 with a vault solvency invariant violation — help me debug it
evals.expected_output: Systematic debugging approach with ghost variable tracing, diagnostic logging, root cause analysis, and reproduction commands

assertions.text: Identifies invariant check location (_checkInvariants in test or SwarmInvariants.sol)
Traces ghost variables (ghost_totalDeposited, ghost_totalWithdrawn, ghost_totalForfeited, ghost_totalMatchClaimed)
Suggests adding diagnostic logging around tick 800
Identifies likely root causes (match pool accounting, early redemption, withdrawal edge cases)

evals.prompt: Add a Sharpe ratio metric to the HTML report dashboard that shows risk-adjusted returns per archetype
evals.expected_output: Modifications to SwarmOrchestrator.sol, HtmlReport.sol with correct Sharpe formula using netWorthAt data

assertions.text: Uses correct Sharpe ratio formula: (mean return - risk-free) / std deviation
Derives returns from existing netWorthAt snapshot data
Modifies HtmlReport.sol to add new visualization
